# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently, only the latest version of this repository is supported for security updates.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within this project, please do not report it publicly. Instead, please report it via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/adityashirsatrao007/php-auth-demo/security/advisories/new) or contact the maintainer directly.
